markdown_full:
# OMKAR VERMA

Assistant Manager

vermaomkar20@gmail.com

+91 7771886697

Permanent Address: Village-Gujara Block- Tilda, Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India 493221

https://linkedin.com/in/omkar-verma-ba4391154/

## EXPERIENCE

**Project Lead - L&T Technology Services**

Jan 2025 – Ongoing. | Lucknow, U.P., India (Smart Metering Project-EESL)

* • Leading Operations and MIS activities for the Smart Meter Project.
* • Ensuring smooth O&M of 1.2 millions smart meters deployed across 12 cities in Uttar Pradesh.
* • Designing and maintaining consumer billing and reading dashboards for 1.2 million consumers.
* • Acting as MIS/Data Analyst: developing and managing smart meter data systems to support business decision-making and ensure SLA compliance as per RFP.

**Project Lead - L&T Technology Services**

Apr 2023 – Dec 2024 | Panaji, India (Panaji Smart City Project)

* • Ensure smooth Operation and Maintenance at site level, maintaining SLA as per RFP.
* • Coordinate with OEM for Operation and Maintenance.
* • Coordinate with Traffic dept., RTO dept. and Police dept. (Law & order).
* • Coordinate with client to fulfill their requirements.

**Project Execution In-charge - L&T Smart World & Communication**

Apr 2021 – Mar 2023 | Panaji, India (Panaji Smart City Project)

* • Implemented Panaji Smart City Project (CAPEX) including Site Survey, Execution Plan, Vendor & Client Management.
* • Implemented CCTV, ATCS, and ITMS as an expert.
* • Completed UAT/FAT inspection of all sites and ICT applications.
* • Conducted training for stakeholders on ATCS, ITMS, CCTV, FRS, and PAS.

---

**Site Engineer - L&T Smart World & Communication**

Jul 2018 – Mar 2021 | Raipur, India (Raipur Smart City Project)

* • Implemented Raipur Smart City Project including Site Survey, AutoCAD drawings, Execution Plan, Vendor Management.
* • Worked as CCTV, ATCS and ITMS Expert.
* • Successfully completed UAT/FAT inspection of all sites.
* • Prepared survey report for Phase-2 of Raipur Smart City Project.

## EDUCATION

**B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - National Institute of Technology Raipur**

2014 – 2018 | Chhattisgarh, India
CGPA - 8.39/10

## ACHIEVEMENTS

* • Successfully Completed Panaji Smart City Project as Project Execution In-Charge
* • Annual Award 2025 - Top Performer
* • Annual Award 2024 - Top Performer
* • Annual Award 2023 - Top Performer
* • Annual Award 2022 - Top Performer
* • Annual Award 2021 - Top Performer
* • Annual Award 2020 - Top Performer and Successfully Completed Raipur Smart City Project

## CORE SKILLS

Project Management, CCTV expert, ITMS expert, ATCS expert, Project Execution, Site Management, Vendor Management, Stakeholder Management, Client Management, Resource Management, Project Coordination, MIS, Data Analytics, Process Improvement.

## COURSES & CERTIFICATIONS

* • Google Project Management – Coursera (6-month professional certificate)
* • Principles of Project Management - (L&T Institute of Project Management)
* • Quality Management System - (ATL NEXT)

## STRENGTHS

Problem Solving, Quick Learning, Deliver Results, Ownership

## INTERESTS

Cricket, Chess
